response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive experience across full-stack development, including TypeScript, Node.js, Nest.js, React, and Vitest, with 6+ years of relevant professional work. His roles show consistent delivery of scalable solutions, from AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq to high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby. While his primary stack aligns well, his experience with Kotlin/Java and AI agent development could be valuable. Minor concerns include limited direct experience with PostgreSQL/MySQL in recent roles and some gaps in cloud platform depth.
strengths: Deep expertise in TypeScript/Node.js and React for full-stack development
Proven ability to design and optimize high-performance systems (e.g., low-latency apps at Dunnhumby, Direct Mail platform at Optilyz)
Strong focus on testing and software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, code reviews) with leadership in dev-ops tooling
concerns: Limited recent experience with PostgreSQL/MySQL in primary roles (heavy MongoDB usage at Optilyz)
Minimal direct exposure to Nest.js in listed roles (though he has worked with similar frameworks)
Some roles lack clear metrics or outcomes tied to scalability/performance improvements
